description_long: This object consists of two modern semi-automatic handguns, one in a tan finish and the other in black, both featuring polymer frames and metal slides. Each handgun is equipped with a tactical accessory rail-mounted flashlight and a red dot optic mounted on the slide. The grips are ergonomically contoured with aggressive texturing for enhanced handling, and the slides have prominent serrations for improved manipulation. The barrels are slightly extended and threaded, suggesting compatibility with suppressors or compensators. The trigger guards are robust and undercut for a higher grip, and the magazine bases are flat with subtle beveling for smooth reloads.
description: A pair of modern, tactical handguns—one tan, one black—each with a mounted flashlight, red dot sight, textured grip, and threaded barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing both handguns' full profiles, highlighting the tan and black finishes, accessory rails, flashlights, and slide serrations.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the threaded barrels, red dot optics, and the tactical flashlights mounted beneath the muzzles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ergonomic grip contours, slide serrations, and the overall length of the handguns.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backstraps, red dot sights, and the top of the slides, with the magazine bases partially visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a pronounced ergonomic contour with aggressive stippling and checkered texturing for secure handling. Finger grooves are subtly integrated, and the backstrap is slightly arched for comfort. The material appears to be high-strength polymer with a matte, non-slip finish. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian, tactical design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and generously sized, with a deep undercut to allow a high grip. Its front edge is squared off and slightly textured, providing additional control for two-handed shooting. The thickness is substantial, and the design is reinforced for durability, with no decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length and features external threading at the muzzle, suitable for attaching suppressors or compensators. The profile is straight and unfluted, with a matte finish matching the slide. No porting or compensator cuts are visible, and the threading is capped.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible slide markings include serrations at both the front and rear for improved grip during slide manipulation. There are no prominent manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations visible in the images, suggesting a minimalist or tactical aesthetic.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight bevel at the edges for smooth insertion and removal. It is flush with the grip, lacking any finger rest or extension, and features minimal texturing. No logos or embellishments are visible, maintaining a streamlined appearance.
